name: Spec control-plane state (by number)
description: The state.json control-plane record for a spec, e.g. bubbles://spec/042/state.json resolves specs/042*/state.json. Read-only. The Bubbles source repo keeps no specs (G085 dogfood guard), so this resolves only in downstream consumer repos; an unmatched or ambiguous number returns ERR_RESOURCE_FAILED.
